arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MSK configuration.

description.description: A brief description of the MSK configuration.

id.description: The unique identifier for the MSK configuration.

kafka_versions.description: A set of Apache Kafka versions that the MSK configuration supports.

latest_revision.description: The latest revision number of the MSK configuration.

server_properties.description: The server properties configuration as a string for the MSK cluster.
